Hearing On The Petitions To Approve The Compromise Of Three Minors - Kia Bromma, Joshua Mendez-Fernandez & Matthew Mendez-Ferndandez.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ryan J. Vlasak, Esq. appeared with petitioners Patricia Castaneda-Marin, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Matthew Mendez-Fernandez and Joshua Mendez-Fernandez, who were also present at today's hearing, and June Bromma, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Kea Bromma, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Salvador Castaneda and Pillar Fernandez, parents of the minors Matthew Mendez-Fernandez and Jushua Mendez-Fernandez, were placed under oath and examined.
William Bromma and Maki Bromma, parents of the minor Kea Bromma, were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Kea Bromma:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,000.00.

The net balance of $3,000.00 shall be made payable to the minor's parents, William Bromma and Maki Bromma.

As to Matthew Mendez-Fernandez:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,000.00.

The net balance of $3,000.00 shall be made payable to the minor's parents, William Bromma and Maki Bromma.

As to Joshua Mendez-Fernandez:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,000.00.

The net balance of $3,000.00 shall be made payable to the minor's parents, William Bromma and Maki Bromma.

Orders approving the compromise of a disputed claim for each minor were submitted to and signed by the Court.
